DATA_EXCHANGE.TITLE: Data Exchange
DATA_EXCHANGE.UPSERT_KEY_PRODUCT: Product: upsert by productId (price and category link are updated for the same productId).
DATA_EXCHANGE.UPSERT_KEY_CUSTOMER: Customer: if partyId is provided and exists, update that customer; otherwise create new.
DATA_EXCHANGE.UPSERT_KEY_SUPPLIER: Supplier: if partyId is provided and exists, update that supplier; otherwise create new.
DATA_EXCHANGE.UPSERT_KEY_FACILITY: Facility: upsert by facilityId (address updated in same import).
DATA_EXCHANGE.UPSERT_KEY_FACILITY_LOCATION: Facility Location: upsert by facilityId + locationSeqId.

DATA_EXCHANGE.ACTIVE_IMPORT_WARNING: An import for this entity is already pending or processing. Refresh the job list or wait for it to finish before submitting another file.
